chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنِ ادَّعَى الْإِمَامَةَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهَا بِأَهْلٍ وَ مَنْ جَحَدَ الْأَئِمَّةَ أَوْ بَعْضَهُمْ وَ مَنْ أَثْبَتَ الْإِمَامَةَ لِمَنْ لَيْسَ لَهَا بِأَهْلٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 85 – The one who claims the Imamate and he is not rightful for it, and the one who denies the Imams<sup>asws</sup>, or some of them<sup>asws</sup>, and the one who affirms the Imamate for the one who is not rightful for it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/193)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/193)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ ثَلَاثَةٌ لَا يُكَلِّمُهُمُ اللَّهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَ لَا يُزَكِّيهِمْ وَ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ مَنِ ادَّعَى إِمَامَةً مِنَ اللَّهِ لَيْسَتْ لَهُ وَ مَنْ جَحَدَ إِمَاماً مِنَ اللَّهِ وَ مَنْ زَعَمَ أَنَّ لَهُمَا فِي الْإِسْلَامِ نَصِيباً .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Washa, from Dawood Al Hammar, from Ibn Abu Yafour,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I heard him<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Three (people), Allah<sup>azwj</sup> will not be Speaking to them on the Day of Judgment, nor will He<sup>azwj</sup> be Purifying them, and for them would be a painful Punishment – the one who alleges that he is an Imam (Appointed by) Allah<sup>azwj</sup> but it (the Imamate) isn’t for him, and the one who denies an Imam<sup>asws</sup> from Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and the one who claims that there is a share for the two of them (number one and number two) in Al-Islam’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ from Dawud al-Himar from ibn abu Ya‘fur who has said the following. “I heard abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) say, ‘On the Day of Judgment Allah will not speak to them, He will not purify them and for them there will be painful suffering. He said it three time. (He added) they are those who claim to be the Imam with Divine authority and, in fact, he is not so, those who reject the Imam who possesses Divine authority and those who think that the two has a share in Islam.”
